title: Goals, Context, Outputs, Boundaries, and Done Conditions · Evaluation Brief: Relevant Context
summary: Write a production-ready prompt for a high-impact code and document change. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt relevant context increment in a reusable goal-context-output-boundary template. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Provide context that can change the result and route the agent to authoritative sources.
State the desired result and audience before prescribing implementation steps.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
